query: SELECT wi.id, wi.name, wi.deviceCode, wi.modelType, wi.slaveId, wi.comPortId, gcp.portNumber, gcp.ipAddress, gcp.networkPort FROM weighingInstruments wi LEFT JOIN gatewayComPorts gcp ON wi.comPortId = gcp.id WHERE gcp.portNumber = 'COM1';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KBF53B6TGXz9Z1D.root --database SQ6yxhwuwXauyoM9DVdVk2 --execute SELECT wi.id, wi.name, wi.deviceCode, wi.modelType, wi.slaveId, wi.comPortId, gcp.portNumber, gcp.ipAddress, gcp.networkPort FROM weighingInstruments wi LEFT JOIN gatewayComPorts gcp ON wi.comPortId = gcp.id WHERE gcp.portNumber = 'COM1';
